tests.name: raja_andur.py eksisteerib
tests.run: python3 -c "import glob, sys; files=[f for f in glob.glob('**/raja_andur.py', recursive=True) if not f.startswith('.github')]; sys.exit(0 if files else 1)"

tests.name: raja_andur.py Python suuntaks korrektne
tests.run: python3 -c "import glob, ast, sys; files=[f for f in glob.glob('**/raja_andur.py', recursive=True) if not f.startswith('.github')]; sys.exit(1) if not files else ast.parse(open(files[0]).read())"

tests.name: raja_andur: 5 sektori kaugused arvutatud (mitte inf stub)
